properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C5 C6 V7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Searching my life Deep on the inside Desiring a closer walk With Jesus Christ Praying on my knees And pouring out my heart Uttering these words to Him, "Lord, I want to die" So here I stand with this desire Lord, I want to die!

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Lord, I want to die Take away this old nature inside All Your blessings are available And I want the keys to have access I want to do the greater works And live in the image of Christ All these promises were made for me But first I need to die

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Now, I'm determined to fight With all my strength and might And persevere in the way You've shown me is right You said it's the narrow way That leads to Eternal Life So through pray'r and supplication Lord, I know the victory's all mine

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: So I'm laying my all On the altar of sacrifice Separating from all sin For Christ to dwell within I'm dedicating my life Tearing down the veil of self-will Lord, I know it's there I'll have the access To my total deliverance

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: Lord, I need to die Take away this old nature inside All Your blessings are available And I want the keys to have access I want to do the greater works And live in the image of Christ All these promises were made for me But first I need to die

verse.name: C6
verse.lines: Lord, I need, I need to die Take away this old nature inside All Your blessings are available And I want the keys to have access I want to do the greater works And live in the image of Christ All these promises were made for me But first I need to die

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: (Rapturing faith is mine) All these promises were made for me But first I need to die (Your holy ghost oh lord) All these promises were made for me But first I need to die (And I'll be just like Christ)
